parse_logical_flexible <- function(x) {
  y <- str_to_lower(str_trim(as.character(x)))
  case_when(
    is.na(y) ~ NA,
    y %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "supported") ~ TRUE,
    y %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "absent") ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

count_candidates <- function(x) {
  y <- as.character(x)
  y <- str_trim(y)

  null_tokens <- c("", ".", "none", "null", "na", "n/a")
  is_null <- is.na(y) | str_to_lower(y) %in% null_tokens

  out <- integer(length(y))
  out[is_null] <- 0L

  idx <- which(!is_null)
  if (length(idx) > 0) {
    split_list <- str_split(y[idx], pattern = "[,;|]", simplify = FALSE)
    out[idx] <- vapply(split_list, function(v) {
      vv <- str_trim(v)
      vv <- vv[!is.na(vv) & vv != ""]
      length(vv)
    }, integer(1))
  }
  as.integer(out)
}

safe_p <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) return("NA")
  format.pval(x, digits = 3, eps = 1e-4)
}

    unresolved_candidate_n  = count_candidates(phylo_unresolved_candidate_ids),
    phylo_unresolved_level_grouped = case_when(
      has_phylo_signal_plot == FALSE ~ "No_signal",
      is.na(phylo_unresolved_level_raw) | phylo_unresolved_level_raw == "" ~ "No_signal",
      phylo_unresolved_level_raw %in% c("Level_A", "Level_B", "Level_C") ~ phylo_unresolved_level_raw,

      "",

    )
  ) %>%

      levels = c("Level_A", "Level_B", "Level_C", "Other", "No_signal")

find_input_file <- function(input_dir, exact_name, include_tokens, exclude_tokens = character()) {
  exact_path <- file.path(input_dir, exact_name)
  if (file.exists(exact_path)) {
    message("Using exact file: ", basename(exact_path))
    return(exact_path)
  }

  all_tsv <- list.files(
    input_dir,
    pattern = "\\.tsv$",
    full.names = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )

  if (length(all_tsv) == 0) {
    stop("No TSV files found in input directory: ", input_dir)
  }

  base_names <- basename(all_tsv)
  base_lower <- tolower(base_names)

  norm_exact <- normalize_name(exact_name)
  norm_base  <- vapply(base_names, normalize_name, character(1))
  if (norm_exact %in% norm_base) {
    chosen <- all_tsv[match(norm_exact, norm_base)]
    message("Using normalized exact-match file for ", exact_name, ": ", basename(chosen))
    return(chosen)
  }

  include_tokens <- tolower(include_tokens)
  exclude_tokens <- tolower(exclude_tokens)

  scores <- vapply(base_lower, function(nm) {
    include_score <- sum(vapply(include_tokens, function(tok) grepl(tok, nm, fixed = TRUE), logical(1)))
    exclude_score <- sum(vapply(exclude_tokens, function(tok) grepl(tok, nm, fixed = TRUE), logical(1)))
    include_score - exclude_score * 10L
  }, integer(1))

  best_score <- max(scores)
  if (best_score <= 0) {
    stop(
      "Could not locate a suitable file for: ", exact_name,
      "\nAvailable TSV files in input directory:\n- ",
      paste(base_names, collapse = "\n- ")
    )
  }

  best_idx <- which(scores == best_score)
  if (length(best_idx) > 1) {
    distances <- adist(tolower(base_names[best_idx]), tolower(exact_name))
    best_idx <- best_idx[which.min(distances)][1]
  }

  chosen <- all_tsv[best_idx][1]
  message("Using fallback matched file for ", exact_name, ": ", basename(chosen))
  return(chosen)
}

        annotation_only_flag
      ),
    by = "sample_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    has_phylo_signal        = parse_logical_flexible(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag),
    annotation_only_logical = parse_logical_flexible(annotation_only_flag),
    has_phylo_signal_plot   = if_else(is.na(has_phylo_signal), FALSE, has_phylo_signal),
    unresolved_candidate_n  = count_candidates(phylo_unresolved_candidate_ids),

    # publication fix:
    # if has signal == TRUE but level is missing/unrecognized, keep it inside "Other"
    # so Figure 6B sample totals close with Figure 6A.
    phylo_unresolved_level_grouped = case_when(
      has_phylo_signal_plot == FALSE ~ "No_signal",
      is.na(phylo_unresolved_level_raw) | phylo_unresolved_level_raw == "" ~ "Other",
      phylo_unresolved_level_raw %in% c("Level_A", "Level_B", "Level_C") ~ phylo_unresolved_level_raw,
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),

    threshold_label = if_else(
      is.na(threshold_used) | threshold_used == "" | str_to_lower(threshold_used) %in% c("na", "null"),
      "",
      threshold_used
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    phylo_unresolved_level_grouped = factor(
      phylo_unresolved_level_grouped,
      levels = c("Level_A", "Level_B", "Level_C", "Other", "No_signal")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    final_type_order,
    desc(unresolved_candidate_n),
    phylo_unresolved_level_grouped,
    sample_id
  ) %>%
  mutate(fig6d_sample_order = row_number())

if (nrow(plot_phylo_sample_metrics) == 0) {
  stop("No rows available after constructing plot_phylo_sample_metrics.")
}

plot_phylo_sample_metrics <- plot_phylo_sample_metrics %>%

fig6a_data <- plot_phylo_sample_metrics %>%
  mutate(
    signal_label = factor(
      if_else(has_phylo_signal_plot, "Present", "Absent"),
      levels = c("Absent", "Present")
    )

fig6a_group_n <- fig6a_data %>%
  count(final_type_eng, name = "total_n")

ct <- xtabs(~ final_type_eng + signal_label, data = fig6a_data)

test_method_6a <- "Test not run"
test_p_6a <- NA_real_

if (nrow(ct) >= 2 && ncol(ct) >= 2 && sum(ct) > 0 && any(rowSums(ct) > 0) && any(colSums(ct) > 0)) {
  chisq_obj <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(chisq.test(ct, correct = FALSE)),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (!is.null(chisq_obj) && all(chisq_obj$expected >= 5)) {
    test_method_6a <- "Chi-squared test"
    test_p_6a <- chisq_obj$p.value
  } else {
    fish_obj <- tryCatch(fisher.test(ct), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(fish_obj)) {
      test_method_6a <- "Fisher's exact test"
      test_p_6a <- fish_obj$p.value
    }
  }
}

fig6a_subtitle <- paste0(

  if (!is.na(test_p_6a)) paste0(", P = ", safe_p(test_p_6a)) else "",
  "."
)

fig6b_ymax <- max(c(0, fig6b_totals$total_n), na.rm = TRUE)

# ----------------------------
# Figure 6C
# ----------------------------
fig6c_data <- plot_phylo_sample_metrics %>%
  mutate(final_type_eng = factor(final_type_eng, levels = final_type_levels))

kw_p_6c <- NA_real_
dunn_summary_6c <- "Not run"
fig6c_subtitle <- NULL

valid_groups_6c <- fig6c_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(final_type_eng), !is.na(unresolved_candidate_n)) %>%
  count(final_type_eng, name = "n") %>%
  filter(n > 0)

values_6c <- fig6c_data$unresolved_candidate_n[!is.na(fig6c_data$unresolved_candidate_n)]

group_n_df_6c <- fig6c_data %>%
  count(final_type_eng, name = "n")

group_n_subtitle <- paste0(
  "n = ",
  paste(group_n_df_6c$n, collapse = " / ")
)

if (nrow(valid_groups_6c) >= 2 && length(unique(values_6c)) > 1) {
  kw_res <- tryCatch(
    kruskal.test(unresolved_candidate_n ~ final_type_eng, data = fig6c_data),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  dunn_res <- tryCatch(
    FSA::dunnTest(unresolved_candidate_n ~ final_type_eng, data = fig6c_data, method = "bh")$res,
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (!is.null(kw_res)) {
    kw_p_6c <- kw_res$p.value
  }

  if (!is.null(dunn_res) && nrow(dunn_res) > 0) {
    dunn_summary_6c <- dunn_res %>%
      transmute(txt = paste0(Comparison, ": adj.P=", safe_p(P.adj))) %>%
      pull(txt) %>%
      paste(collapse = "; ")
  }

  fig6c_subtitle <- paste0(
    "Kruskal-Wallis P = ", safe_p(kw_p_6c),
    "; ", group_n_subtitle
  )
} else {
  fig6c_subtitle <- paste0(
    "Statistics not run due to insufficient variation; ",
    group_n_subtitle
  )
}

fig6c_plot <- ggplot(fig6c_data, aes(x = final_type_eng, y = unresolved_candidate_n, fill = final_type_eng)) +

这版已经对上了，可以作为 Figure 6 的论文版基础了。
从你刚上传的总图看，前面那 3 个问题现在都处理得更合理了：6C 的统计说明已经压缩成短 subtitle，不再挤爆图底；6D 不再重复整列 98.5，而是改成统一说明；总图的整体可读性比上一版明显好。
